chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Misc: Application No.S-318 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 22.10.2025 Mr.Munir Ahmed Turk, Advocate for the applicant Ms.Sana Memon, A.P.G a/w SIP Anwar Hussain of PS Badin ******** The concerned Officer has produced the detainee Ms.Sajda d/o Muhammad Soomar, who submits that she has been allegedly kidnapped, however, without prejudice to the forgoing, the concerned Officer is directed to record her statement and take action in accordance with law. Meanwhile, detainee is at liberty to proceed as desired to her home with her family and the law enforcing agency should provide adequate protection to her. Accordingly, the purpose of this application has been served and matter stands disposed of in above terms. The observations made by this Court herein are tentative, shall not prejudice the case of either party. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
